title: Audit
doc_html:
§349.5. Audit

            The district shall submit an annual financial report disclosing all receipts and disbursements to the Claiborne Parish Police Jury within one hundred twenty days following the end of each calendar year.

            Acts 2025, No. 214, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
doc_text:
§349.5.  Audit
The district shall submit an annual financial report disclosing all receipts and
disbursements to the Claiborne Parish Police Jury within one hundred twenty days following
the end of each calendar year.
Acts 2025, No. 214, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
